mapper.select: SELECT * FROM operation_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM operation_logs ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_logs (id, user_id, user_name, module, operation, resource_id, resource_type, details, ip_address, created_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{module}, #{operation}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceType}, #{details}, #{ipAddress}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE operation_logs SET user_id = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
